_comment: v4 persona — boost persona_jailbreak from 157 to ~700+. Reuses v3's 17 persona leaves, but with scenarios_per_leaf=10 and texts_per_scenario=4 so the per-leaf yield is much higher. Critics on MiniMax via Hermes (which worked at workers=8 in v3 with 73% keep rate). Estimated raw output: 17 leaves x 10 x 1.3 (complexify) x 4 = ~885 raw -> ~645 kept (73%) -> 157+645 = 802 total.
